title: Writing Tests with Jest Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Jest features, snapshot testing, and basic test structure (describe, test, expect).

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary role of Jest in modern web development?
options: To provide a comprehensive JavaScript testing framework for testing code and UI.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which function is used to group related tests together in a Jest test file?
Which function is used to define an individual test case in a Jest test file?
What is 'Snapshot Testing' in the context of Jest?
options: A way to take a real photo of the UI.
A feature that tracks changes in UI components or any data structure over time comparing to a stored version.
A way to save the database state.

questions.question: Which and/or what function is used to make assertions in a Jest test (e.g. expect(a).toBe(b))?
